keyPoints: An intelligent agent is a computer program that perceives its environment and acts upon it.
A rational agent is one that makes decisions based on a set of rules or goals.
The environment of an agent can be considered as a complex system that interacts with the agent.
An agent can be structured into different components such as perception, reasoning, and action.
The concept of rationality is crucial in the design of intelligent agents.
The nature of environment is a critical factor in the development of intelligent agents.
The structure of agents is an essential aspect of intelligent systems.
